title: 宝塚記念の後に・節目に立ちて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Th-that race was out of this world! Did you see
Mejiro Ardan?!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah, that was a sick race... I actually think
maybe she could go toe-to-toe with Oguri Cap,
y'know?

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Geez. I can't even imagine what'd happen if those
two went up against each other right now...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I just can't get enough of this.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: And I can't wait until our next bout either.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: (...I can feel it.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(The places we were destined for in history... are
changing for each of us.)

text_block_list.name: Chiyono O and Yaeno
text_block_list.text:
Ardan!
Ardan.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I did it... I overcame my limits, too... What an
amazing race!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
This race was testament to the endless potential
each of us possesses.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I agree, truly. It was a miraculous race indeed.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Chiyono O. Yaeno.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I'm glad you're my rivals.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: When next we race, I shall—

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I will...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: No, I will—

text_block_list.name: Ardan, Chiyono O, and Yaeno
text_block_list.text: Win!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day after the Takarazuka Kinen, and
Mejiro Ardan and I are having a discussion to
decide her next goal race.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: It is my wish to race against Oguri.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan looks me in the eye as she speaks
with absolute conviction.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Yes. I believe that time is precisely now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
At yesterday's Takarazuka Kinen, I went up
against Inari—a racer said to be a pillar of our
generation.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Although she was certainly a formidable
opponent... I do believe that I managed to hold
my own against her.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I have rivals, whom I cherish very much.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
And they have lifted me up to such heights that
I'm now able to compete with Inari.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I wonder... If I were to compete against Oguri—as I am now—what sort of result might that yield?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: My body aches for the opportunity to find out.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Please do share your thoughts on this matter,
Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can see it myself, too. Mejiro Ardan has attained
extraordinary strength through all those intense
clashes against her rivals.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As her trainer, I have no problem with her
competing with Oguri Cap as the culmination of
her senior year.
choice_data_list:
Let's set the autumn Tenno Sho as our ultimate
goal!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's no doubt in my mind that Oguri Cap will
make an appearance there. As to why...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
It's a storied stage, perfectly fitting for a turning
point in history. Racers from far and wide are sure
to gather in shared pursuit of the title of "the
greatest."

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Incidentally, I noticed that your exact words were
"ultimate goal"...
choice_data_list: I'd like you to enter the Mainichi Okan first.
I'd like you to enter the Mainichi Okan first.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My plan is to see how she runs in the Mainichi
Okan, then make adjustments before the autumn
Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On top of that, if we're lucky, Oguri Cap might
even show up at the Mainichi Okan. If she does,
I'll be able to get a better read on what she's
capable of.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Understood. Well then, let's make today the
beginning of our progress toward the Mainichi
Okan.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The culmination of Mejiro Ardan's senior year
awaits... But before that, the Mainichi Okan!
